name: COVID at my healthcare job in Sandy—can I claim occupational disease in Utah?
description: Yes, prove work contraction like other occupational diseases.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: COVID at my healthcare job in Sandy—can I claim occupational disease in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, prove work contraction like other occupational diseases.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if proven to arise from work exposure, similar to Idaho precedents on acute diseases.[1][2] Healthcare presumption may apply.[4] Key factors: Medical proof of work contraction; on-duty timing; outweigh non-work risks.[2] File Form 122 fast with tests and shift logs. Attorney aids in tough causation battles.
